name: Parmesan Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 8 medium Red potatoes with peel, halved lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour butter into a 13x9 pan.
2. Sprinkle cheese over the butter.
3. Place potatoes with cut side down over cheese.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 400°F for 40-45 minutes or until tender.
